mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, name, canvas_width, canvas_height, background_color, status, ai_tags, created_at, updated_at FROM ad_project WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, user_id, name, canvas_width, canvas_height, background_color, status, ai_tags, created_at, updated_at FROM ad_project ORDER BY updated_at DESC
SELECT id, user_id, name, canvas_width, canvas_height, background_color, status, ai_tags, created_at, updated_at FROM ad_project WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY updated_at DESC
SELECT id, user_id, name, canvas_width, canvas_height, background_color, status, ai_tags, created_at, updated_at FROM ad_project WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY updated_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ad_project (user_id, name, canvas_width, canvas_height, background_color, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{name}, #{canvasWidth}, #{canvasHeight}, #{backgroundColor}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE ad_project SET name = #{name}, canvas_width = #{canvasWidth}, canvas_height = #{canvasHeight}, background_color = #{backgroundColor}, status = #{status}, ai_tags = #{aiTags} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE ad_project SET ai_tags = #{aiTags} WHERE id = #{id}
